privileged_info_summary: No explicit metadata field exists in task.json. The task uses synthetic data created by setup_task.sh containing 18 fill-up records (with 1 duplicate on 2024-03-11). Data quality issues include: 3 Miles entries with text units ('298 mi', '245 miles', '312 mi'), 3 Gallons entries with text units ('11.8 gal', '10.5 gallons', '12.8 gal'), inconsistent weather capitalization (6 variants: COLD, Cold, Hot, Mild, Warm, hot), and inconsistent AC usage formats (7 variants: NO, No, On, YES, Yes, no, yes). Calculated MPG values range from 24.38 to 29.48 MPG (all below the stated 32 MPG baseline). After duplicate removal, 17 data rows remain, all within the expected 18-45 MPG reasonable range.

task_structure.description: Diagnose fuel economy drop by cleaning messy fill-up data, calculating MPG with formulas, standardizing categories, removing duplicates, and applying conditional formatting

audit_notes.data_provenance: Synthetic data created in setup_task.sh line 13-39 as embedded CSV
